sentences.text: Thank you for calling the Fulton asset management company tenant inquiry line. We look forward to speaking with you if you are unable to reach your contract initially. If you would like to speak with Brian drew, please press two. If you would like to speak with Melissa Davis, please press three. If you would like to speak with Daniel Lee please press for. Telephone number eight one six six eight three four six five one account to take your call now at the tone please record your message. When you have finished recording simply hang up or press pound for further options.
